---
title: "Future Directions in Accounting Analytics"
format: html
---

### Learning Objectives of the Chapter {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note title = "Learning Objectives" collapse = "true"}
::: {style="text-align: justify"}
At the End of the Chapter, Students should be Able to -

- Learn about the recent developments in data analytics 

- Gain an understanding how those changes affect them and future of analytics 

::: 

::: 


## Emerging Technologies

## Trends & Predictions

## Preparing for the Future Accounting Analytics
